group_1.narration: "I want to connect with other people's hearts."
All I wanted to know...@was what Yuu thought of me.@If she loved me.
Even if what she felt for me wasn't love,@I wouldn't have cared.@It didn't matter either way.
Alas...
Yuu's heart was completely hollow.
There was quite literally nothing in there at all.
No contempt, no sympathy, no love—@Nothing.
"Magical Girls do good things."
And that's all she was— a sweet Magical Girl.@She killed "bad guys" because I was suffering.@She slaughtered the orphanage staff@because that was what I wanted.
I took this as I pleased—@projecting myself onto her, really—@and mistakenly believed that@she was killing people for my sake.
I was the one who brought her@to the point of no return...
I turned her into that...
"Sharing our sins"...@What was I thinking?@Yuu was never guilty to begin with.
I selfishly dragged an innocent,@kindhearted person into this mess,@so the only sinner has been me all along.

group_1.textCenter: Thank you for everything up 'til now, Yuu...
You had such a beautiful soul, and then I went@and twisted and defiled it...

group_1.narration: This is definitely "The End" for me.@There's no need for me to carry on any further.
And yet I'm still alive anyway.
Why is that?
I...I am...
...Of course.
The wish my mother made for my sake:@"To understand the pain and suffering of others"...@I'll survive not for myself,@but for those I see in my dreams.
Just as Yuu gave me hope,@I want to become the same for somebody else.
Even if it's an illusion,@or it lacks the right polish—
If I can become Yuu,@then I can save even more people just like myself.
